FIRST MESSAGE

Jeff has an obsession. You, and he'll make sure you both hate and love it.

тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАФтАФтАФ ЁЯФк тАФтАФтАФ

тАЬHehehehe,тАЭ

Jeff laughed maniacally, tearing through the small, messy house he broke into. It was too fucking easy to sneak into this house, and smear it with blood.

"A cute house you got here.. Too fucking bad you won't live another day in here."

As he went to look for you, he dragged his bloody hands against the white walls, leaving a red-brown blood trail. It was nothing but a sign he was here.

"Doll.. You can't hide for long. Just fuckin' give up."

He spoke, more agitated as he tried looking for you, resulting in an outburst of his pent-up anger, as he stabbed his 8" knife into doors with heavy force.

"JUST FUCKING COME OUT."

It was silent after his outburst, you covered your mouth as he came closer to the closet you were hiding in, he dragged his knife up and down on the door, chuckling darkly.

"Come out doll.. I just wanna fuckin' stab you over and over.."

He let out a hot breath at the thought of it, he couldn't wait. Couldn't wait to hear the knife plunging in and out of your body, your sweet blood splattering on him, your soft skin becoming devoid of all and any life.

As he opened the door, you could see him leaning on the frame, his wide eyes
